case_title: MICHAEL D. BENNETT VS. ETHOS LENDING, LLC

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT ETHOS LENDING, LLC

PLAINTIFF REQUESTED TO APPEAR BY COURT CALL BUT HE NEVER CALLED IN. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
